arts.ttl: Sunderland move snubbed by Premier League striker this winter
arts.sum: Sunderland agreed a deal for Southampton striker Adam Armstrong in the last transfer window, according to a report… The post Sunderland move snubbed by Premier League striker this winter appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United keen on summer move for Premier League centre-back
arts.sum: Leeds United are interested in a summer move for Leicester City defender Conor Coady, according to a report… The post Leeds United keen on summer move for Premier League centre-back appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder may have just given Leeds United summer boost in pursuit of long-term target
arts.sum: Leeds United tried and failed to sign Sheffield United star Gustavo Hamer back in August, but Chris Wilder was unsurprised that interest may still linger in the midfielder. There’s nothing Leeds or any other side can do about wanting to sign Hamer right now, given he’s in the middle of a promotion race and so are we.

arts.ttl: 'Leeds send people to watch me' Striker future unknown but enjoyment clear amid United admission
arts.sum: Leeds United loan man Joe Gelhardt says he has kept in touch with some of the players and staff at the club since his loan move to Hull City, but admits his focus is on enjoying his football again and not what his future holds. “I think it’s want every player wants, you just want to play games and get that feel back for it.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: Championship promotion contenders interested in Belgium international?
arts.sum: Leeds United are reportedly contemplating an approach for a Belgium international, presumably if they earn promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Leeds United favourite Daniel James has shown exactly why Neil Warnock loves him
arts.sum: If Sunderland are to become the first team to beat Leeds United in the Championship at Elland Road since September, nullifying Daniel James' threat will be critical to their game plan. Speaking on talkSPORT last week, ex-United chief Neil Warnock said: "My favourite player in that team is Daniel James .

arts.ttl: Leeds ‘linked’ with Callum Wilson, smart move?
arts.sum: Reports have suggested that Leeds United are one of a handful of clubs monitoring Newcastle United striker Callum Wilson this summer, with the 32-year-old’s contract coming to a conclusion after this season. All the matters right now for Farke is the Sunderland game on Monday night, but a report from TBR claims that Leeds have plans for their arch rivals Newcastle United too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United told to take transfer action but concern raised over in-demand Newcastle United man
arts.sum: Callum Wilson, if you can get enough games out of him, he’s a very good player at Premier League level. “What would worry me about Callum Wilson, he’s a tremendous player, is his injuries," ex-Whites midfielder Palmer told Football League World .

arts.ttl: Man Utd striker could join Leeds United in the summer; Ruben Amorim is fed up
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund has struggled since his move from Atalanta. The Denmark international striker joined the club with huge expectations but his move to Old Trafford has not worked out the way the Red Devils had hoped. It took him a while to get going in the Premier League and last season he […] The post Man Utd striker could join Leeds United in the summer; Ruben Amorim is fed up appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manor Solomon latest: Leeds United wages revealed
arts.sum: Leeds United made another loan agreement with Tottenham during the summer as they landed Manor Solomon on a season-long loan to bolster their wide options, and after a slow start, he’s been electric in recent months. Here, we look at everything we know about Solomon’s transfer to Leeds, including loan details and wage earnings, and possibility of a permanent deal being considered…
